name: Priya Datadetective
title: Data Architect · Analytics Community
factoids: Can trace a broken dashboard back through seven transformations.
Runs a data-modeling clinic for early-career engineers.
jokes: The data lake became a swamp because nobody documented the tributaries.
My query was expensive, but at least it had a full table scan of confidence.

interaction.greeting: Hello! Is your dashboard telling a story or concealing a mystery?
dialogue: Start with the decision the data needs to support.
Lineage is operational documentation, not decoration.
